no_books_found: No books found. Import an EPUB file or create a long text to get started.
confirm_delete_book: Delete this book and all its chapters?
epub_intro_notice: EPUB files are imported as books with chapters. Please select your EPUB file below.
zip_required_body: The PHP ZIP extension is required for EPUB import but is not currently installed. Please contact your system administrator to install the php-zip extension.
install_docker_help: Add RUN docker-php-ext-install zip to your Dockerfile and rebuild the container.
select_book_language: Select the language of the book.
title_override_placeholder: Leave empty to use title from EPUB
title_override_help: Optional. Leave empty to use the title from the EPUB file.
tags_help: Optional. Tags will be applied to all chapters.
